items.title: PSG coach on managing player rest: 'Like Tetris'
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain coach Luis Enrique is weighing up how many players to rest for Saturday's home game against mid-table Lorient in Ligue 1.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Jayawardene: Bumrah, Suryakumar are 'match winners', will keep coming back
items.summary: "We just keep on pushing. I mean, that's what has worked for them for many years, that's where the success comes. Sometimes it will not have the results that they want."
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Makai Lemon: I definitely feel like I'll click well with DeVonta Smith
items.summary: The Eagles brought in receiver Makai Lemon with the No. 20 overall pick in this year's draft, ostensibly setting him up to be one of the club's top wideouts alongside DeVonta Sm...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
